result.stdout:
Usage: cf4dotNet [options] [command]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information

Commands:
  api      Creates an API Gateway Cloudformation template from your dotNet code.
  lambdas  Creates Lambdas Cloudformation template from your dotNet code.

Use "cf4dotNet [command] --help" for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: cf4dotNet [options] [command]

Options:
  -? | -h | --help  Show help information

Commands:
  api      Creates an API Gateway Cloudformation template from your dotNet code.
  lambdas  Creates Lambdas Cloudformation template from your dotNet code.

Use "cf4dotNet [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: cf4dotNet api [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  source  Your dotnet dll source file full path (e.g. E:/src/my-dotnet-api.dll).

Options:
  -? | -h | --help                             Show help information
  -n|--name <api-name>                         API Name (default: 'api').
  -r|--rate <api-rate>                         API Rate Limit (default: '100').
  -rb|--burst <api-rate-burst>                 API Rate Burst (default: '200').
  -e|--environment <dev/test/qa/staging/prod>  Environment (default: 'prod').
  -c|--configuration <2-accounts>              Accounts configuration (default: '2-accounts').
  -b|--build <build-version>                   Build version number used to create incremental resources (default: '1').
  -o|--ouput <output-path>                     Cloudformation templates will get created here (default: '.').
  -p|--prefix <functions-prefix>               Llambdas prefix code (default: 'myapi-').
